name: Potato Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any lumps from the mashed potatoes.
2. Add butter and beat until smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar and blend well.
4. Incorporate cocoa or cooled melted chocolate, vanilla, salt, and coconut.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper.
6. Keep the candy in regular shape and size.
7. Place in refrigerator to harden.
8. Store in a tightly covered container.
Makes about 1 1/2 pounds of potato kisses.
